CarryForwardBoundaryMap:
- heading "Carry-forward boundary map" [level=2]
- paragraph: Phase 3 closes here. Phase 4 and live-later work continue from explicit published seams.
- article:
  - strong: Phase 3 closed truth
  - list:
    - listitem: seq_278 · Freeze BookingCase kernel, state machine, and intent lineage contract
    - listitem: seq_279 · Freeze provider capability matrix, adapter profiles, and confirmation gates
    - listitem: seq_280 · Freeze slot snapshot, offer scoring, commit, and manage contracts
    - listitem: seq_281 · Open the Phase 4 local-booking implementation gate with exact ownership
- article:
  - strong: Phase 4 implementation
  - list:
    - listitem: par_282 · Implement durable BookingCase backend kernel
    - listitem: par_283 · Implement capability compiler and audience-aware capability resolution engine
- article:
  - strong: Live-later onboarding
  - list:
    - listitem: future_live_provider_activation · Replace simulator-backed telephony and secure-message providers with live adapters
    - listitem: future_transport_integration_track · Replace simulator-backed reminders and admin notifications with live outbound delivery workers
    - listitem: future_phase3_live_projection_fetch_hardening · Replace seeded Phase 3 merge-bundle reads with live command-api fetch consumption
    - listitem: future_phase9_control_plane_activation · Bind release-watch, channel-freeze, and content-authoring refs to live operational control planes
- table:
  - rowgroup:
    - row "Owner Item Category Risk":
      - columnheader "Owner"
      - columnheader "Item"
      - columnheader "Category"
      - columnheader "Risk"
  - rowgroup:
    - row "seq_278 Freeze BookingCase kernel, state machine, and intent lineage contract phase4 boundary Phase 4 implementation could drift if the BookingCase kernel is not frozen before executable work continues.":
      - cell "seq_278"
      - cell "Freeze BookingCase kernel, state machine, and intent lineage contract"
      - cell "phase4 boundary"
      - cell "Phase 4 implementation could drift if the BookingCase kernel is not frozen before executable work continues."
    - row "seq_279 Freeze provider capability matrix, adapter profiles, and confirmation gates phase4 boundary Capability truth could fork if Phase 4 local booking infers supplier behaviour locally.":
      - cell "seq_279"
      - cell "Freeze provider capability matrix, adapter profiles, and confirmation gates"
      - cell "phase4 boundary"
      - cell "Capability truth could fork if Phase 4 local booking infers supplier behaviour locally."
    - row "seq_280 Freeze slot snapshot, offer scoring, commit, and manage contracts phase4 boundary Reservation truth and confirmation truth could drift if slot, offer, and manage semantics are not frozen before implementation.":
      - cell "seq_280"
      - cell "Freeze slot snapshot, offer scoring, commit, and manage contracts"
      - cell "phase4 boundary"
      - cell "Reservation truth and confirmation truth could drift if slot, offer, and manage semantics are not frozen before implementation."
    - row "seq_281 Open the Phase 4 local-booking implementation gate with exact ownership phase4 boundary Parallel implementation could overlap or duplicate ownership if the gate is not explicit.":
      - cell "seq_281"
      - cell "Open the Phase 4 local-booking implementation gate with exact ownership"
      - cell "phase4 boundary"
      - cell "Parallel implementation could overlap or duplicate ownership if the gate is not explicit."
    - row "par_282 Implement durable BookingCase backend kernel phase4 execution Booking intent would remain a lawful seed without the durable case state machine needed for Phase 4 execution.":
      - cell "par_282"
      - cell "Implement durable BookingCase backend kernel"
      - cell "phase4 execution"
      - cell "Booking intent would remain a lawful seed without the durable case state machine needed for Phase 4 execution."
    - row "par_283 Implement capability compiler and audience-aware capability resolution engine phase4 execution Provider capability projection would remain static and Phase 4 flows could infer capability locally.":
      - cell "par_283"
      - cell "Implement capability compiler and audience-aware capability resolution engine"
      - cell "phase4 execution"
      - cell "Provider capability projection would remain static and Phase 4 flows could infer capability locally."
    - row "future_live_provider_activation Replace simulator-backed telephony and secure-message providers with live adapters live later Production transport, receipt, and delivery semantics are not yet proven against live providers.":
      - cell "future_live_provider_activation"
      - cell "Replace simulator-backed telephony and secure-message providers with live adapters"
      - cell "live later"
      - cell "Production transport, receipt, and delivery semantics are not yet proven against live providers."
    - row "future_transport_integration_track Replace simulator-backed reminders and admin notifications with live outbound delivery workers live later Reminder and notification timing remains functionally correct in-kernel but not yet operationally proven on live delivery rails.":
      - cell "future_transport_integration_track"
      - cell "Replace simulator-backed reminders and admin notifications with live outbound delivery workers"
      - cell "live later"
      - cell "Reminder and notification timing remains functionally correct in-kernel but not yet operationally proven on live delivery rails."
    - row "future_phase3_live_projection_fetch_hardening Replace seeded Phase 3 merge-bundle reads with live command-api fetch consumption live later Browser parity is proven today, but runtime drift could still hide behind seeded helpers until live fetches take over.":
      - cell "future_phase3_live_projection_fetch_hardening"
      - cell "Replace seeded Phase 3 merge-bundle reads with live command-api fetch consumption"
      - cell "live later"
      - cell "Browser parity is proven today, but runtime drift could still hide behind seeded helpers until live fetches take over."
    - row "future_phase9_control_plane_activation Bind release-watch, channel-freeze, and content-authoring refs to live operational control planes live later Current consequence and content proofs can be mistaken for live operational readiness if the seeded control-plane boundary is not preserved.":
      - cell "future_phase9_control_plane_activation"
      - cell "Bind release-watch, channel-freeze, and content-authoring refs to live operational control planes"
      - cell "live later"
      - cell "Current consequence and content proofs can be mistaken for live operational readiness if the seeded control-plane boundary is not preserved."
